info.title: ShippingGuide API
info.description: The Shipping Guide API provides available services for a given combination of sender and recipient locations, including estimated delivery times, prices and environmental data. It also returns logo and human readable service descriptions that can be shown in your checkout. Available services are based on your agreement with Bring (i.e. the customer numbers attached to your user)

post.description:
Use this endpoint to get expected delivery, prices, service categories and additional information.

Measurements

For cargo services(5100, 5300, 9100, CARGO), Weight is mandatory and one of the Volume / Load Meter / Dimensions / Number of Pallets is mandatory.

Note: The prices for our revised services depends on volumetric weight: 5000, 5100, 5300, 5600, 5800, 4850 plus return services 9000, 9100, 9300 or 9600. For these services, dimensions (L/W/H) is needed to calculate the expected price correctly. Dimensions are also used to decide if handling fee or specialgoods fee will apply to the shipment. You might leave dimensions empty in your request, but be aware that returned prices might be incorrect.

text/plain.example: Request rate cannot exceed 60 requests per 1 second

packages.description: List of all packages in the consignment

fromCountryCode.description: Two-letter ISO-3166-1 country code of which consignment is sent from

fromPostalCode.description: The postal code the consignment is sent from

toCountryCode.description: Two-letter ISO-3166-1 country code of which consignment is sent to

toPostalCode.description: The postal code the consignment is to be delivered to

addressLine.description: The street name and number the consignment is to be delivered to

toCity.description: The city the consignment is to be delivered to

shippingDate.description: The date (and optionally time) the consignment will be shipped (used for computing estimated delivery date). NOTE: The lead time calculation interprets the provided date & time as the time when the consignment has been scanned at the terminal. If not provided, now() will be used

dangerousGoods.description: If dangerous goods are to be part of the consignment, the ADR-code(s) specifying the dangerous goods type(s) has to be provided

pickupPointId.description: The pickup point id to which the consignment is to be shipped to. Only relevant for parcel products

pickupPoints.description: List of pickup points for which estimated delivery time should be calculated for (if varue of 'WithEstimatedDeliveryTime' is true). If not provided, the default pickup point for the receiver's postal code will be used.

products.description: List of all services price and lead times should be calculated for

id.description: Your internal reference to this consignment (you may calculate several consignment at the same time)

height.description: Height of the package in centimeters

width.description: Width of the package in centimeters

length.description: Length of the package in centimeters. The highest value of height, width and length will always be used as length

grossWeight.description: The weight of the package in gram

volume.description: The volume of the package in cubic decimeters

volumeSpecial.description: Set to true if you know the package price will be adjusted for special volume. Typically used for roll or other weirdly shaped packages.

nonStackable.description: Set to true if you know the package/pallet is non-stackable

numberOfPallets.description: Number of pallets. Only applicable for cargo products

loadMeter.description: Loading meters. Only applicable for cargo products

id.description: Your internal reference to this package (you may estimate several packages at the same time)

ProductIdType.description: A service you want price and lead times calculated for

customerNumber.description: The mybring API customer number. Different customer numbers exist for different services, therefore the customer number is specified for each requested service. If a valid customer number is supplied, net prices will be returned for the specified service. Otherwise list (gross) prices is returned.

Payer.description: Which party will pay for the shipment

nonStandardCourierService.description: Required field when requesting non standard courier products. Represents the customer specific service code

ShippingDate.description: The date (and optionally time) the consignment will be shipped (used for computing estimated delivery date). NOTE: The lead time calculation interprets the provided date & time as the time when the consignment has been scanned at the terminal. If not provided, now() will be used

language.description: Language in which human-readable message should be returned.

withPrice.description: Controls whether prices should be calculated. If customerNumber is supplied, the authenticated user requires the financial role with the provided customer

withExpectedDelivery.description: Controls whether lead times should be calculated or not

withGuiInformation.description: Return detailed information about requested service(s)

numberOfAlternativeDeliveryDates.description: Number of alternative delivery dates to be suggested

edi.description: Should the parcel be registered using EDI when shipped. Note that this flag may affect price and which services are available

postingAtPostoffice.description: Will the parcel be delivered at a post office when shipped

withEstimatedDeliveryTime.description: Extended lead time information, including predicted arrivar time at pickup point. Only supported for a limited set of services

withEnvironmentalData.description: Return environmental data about fossil free and electric transportation used on the shipments transport legs

workingDays.description: Number of working days until delivery

products.description:
The requested services results.

ShippingGuide will never remove services from the request if unable to calculate any of the requested data. It will either return the requested data or a service level error code along with a description.

DateAndTimeType.description: Latest pickup time is the latest possible pickup time, or in other words the latest time Bring are able to pick up your shipment for the specified services (on the date same date as the earliest pickup date). Please be advised that if you don't fill out Hour and Minute in ShippingDate in your request, ShippingGuide will assume that you want an immediate pickup of your shipment

courier.description: Courier service data required to make EDI booking

quickpack.description: Quickpack service data required to make EDI booking

cargo.description: Cargo service data required to make EDI booking

electric.description: Share of electric vehicles used on this transportation leg

bio.description: Share of bio-diesel vehicles used on this transportation leg

description.description: Human-readable description of the error that occurred

pickupPointId.description: Pickup point id. Either provided in the request or fetched as default pickup point for recipient postal code

deliveryStartTime.description: Delivery time window start time at the specified pickup point

deliveryEndTime.description: Delivery time window end time at the specified pickup point

workingDays.description: Number of working days until delivery
The expected number of working days to deliver the shipment

bookingCutoffTime.description: The deadline for booking a shipment to the given destination. Only relevant for OIL_EXPRESS.

userMessage.description: If there is known inaccuracy in the calculated lead time, this message will contain a human readable text explaining the deviation

formattedExpectedDeliveryDate.description: Expected delivery date/time formatted as dd.MM.YYYY HH:mm

earliestPickupDate.description: Earliest pickup date is the earliest possible pickup time, or in other words the earliest time Bring are able to pick up your shipment for the specified services. Please be advised that if you don't fill out Hour and Minute in ShippingDate in your request, ShippingGuide will assume that you want an immediate pickup of your shipment

latestPickupTime.description: Latest pickup time is the latest possible pickup time, or in other words the latest time Bring are able to pick up your shipment for the specified services (on the date same date as the earliest pickup date). Please be advised that if you don't fill out Hour and Minute in ShippingDate in your request, ShippingGuide will assume that you want an immediate pickup of your shipment

sameDayDelivery.description: Same day delivery details. Only relevant for services supporting delivery today or tomorrow like 5600 + 2012 VAS

logo.description: Logo type to be used with this service

logoUrl.description: URL to a suitable logo in svg format

closestPickupPoint.description: Default pickup point for the requested toPostalCode. Only relevant for pickup point services SERVICEPAKKE, 5800 and 3067
closestPickupPoint.example: Pakkeboks Store Brevik. Åpningstider Man - Søn: 0000-2359

environmentalLogoUrl.description: URL to logo for labelling service as environmental friendly

environmentalTagUrl.description: URL to tag for labelling services as environmental friendly

PriceType.description: Net (agreeemnt) price for shipping the service. Will only be calculated if a valid customer number has been supplied for the service

agreementAttributes.description: Agreement price (contract/agreement) attributes used for net prices used for producing EDI. Never set for list prices.

netPriceFailed.description: Only used for net prices in the scenario where net price calculation fails. If true, returned net price will be equal to list price, or a partially discounted price (i.e. a value between the list price and the correct net price)

totalZoneCount.description: The total number of price zones used during price calculation

listPrice.description: List price for shipping the service

netPrice.description: Net (agreeemnt) price for shipping the service. Will only be calculated if a valid customer number has been supplied for the service

productionCode.description: Backend system production code. This code is required when producing valid EDI messages during ordering.

sortingCode.description: Sorting code. Only relevant for home delivery services with Norway as destination.

sortingDirection.description: Sorting direction. Only relevant for home delivery services with Norway as destination.

greenDelivery.description: Indicates whether the shipment is being delivered with fossil free transportation or not. Only relevant for HD-services

guiInformation.description: Detailed description of the requested service. All texts are in the requested language whenever translations are available.

price.description: Requested service and additional services prices

expectedDelivery.description: Expected delivery details for the shipment

estimatedDeliveryTimes.description: Estimated delivery times at provided pickup point ids. Only relevant when withEstimatedDeliveryTime flag is set for services delivered to pickup point.

environmentalData.description: Estimated delivery times at provided pickup point ids. Only relevant when withEstimatedDeliveryTime flag is set for services delivered to pickup point.

edi.description: EDI information required to make EDI bookings

errors.description: Errors related to requested service, if any

warnings.description: Warnings related to the requested service, if any. Warnings could explain why some parts of the requested data is missing

upsSpecificEdiParameters.description: Quickpack service data required to make EDI booking while using UPS as a transport service provider

fossilFree.description: If true, shipment is transported by fossil free vehicles on this leg

nordicSwanEcoLabel.description: If true, shipment that is transported is nordic swan eco labeled

UpsSpecificEdiParametersType.description: Quickpack service data required to make EDI booking while using UPS as a transport service provider

fieldErrors.message: Number of alternative delivery dates must be less than 10
One of the consignment is missing product id. Product id is mandatory on each consignment.

environmentalData.description: Pakken leveres fossilfritt til din adresse

guiInformation.descriptionText: Pakken kan spores og leveres hjem til deg mellom kl. 17-21. Posten varsler deg før levering.
guiInformation.helpText: Pakke levert hjem leveres til mottaker mellom kl.  17-21. Mottaker varsles i god tid om forventet utleveringsdag via SMS eller e-post, i tillegg til nytt varsel når sendingen er lastet på bil for utkjøring samme dag. Mottaker kan gi Posten fullmakt til at pakken settes igjen ved døren eller et angitt sted hvis mottaker ikke er hjemme. Sjåføren varsler deg før levering på kveldstid. Mottaker kan endre leveringsdag når pakken spores (gjelder ikke lokalpakker). Dersom sendingen ikke kan leveres, blir den sendt til mottakers lokale hentested (postkontor eller Post i Butikk). Sendingen kan spores ved hjelp av sporingsnummeret.
